Golem Durrës Albania
Property ID: Roy134498

1+1 APARTMENT FOR SALE IN GOLEM – 200M FROM THE SEA

75,000 €

Gross Area 64m²

Interior Area 64m²

Bedrooms 1

Floor 4

Status Used

Type Apartment

Fully Furnished

Description

Century 21 Tirana offers for sale a 1+1 apartment located in Golem, Durrës, just 200 meters from the sea. The apartment is on the 4th floor of a well-maintained building. It features a living room with open kitchen, one bedroom, and one bathroom. The apartment is fully furnished and ready to move in. Perfect for a summer residence or investment property.

Property Info

  • Elevator: No
  • Fully Furnished
  • Baths: 1
  • Living room: 1

  • Near the Beach
